title: Kilner Universal Jar Push-Top Lid 2 Litre Glass Food Container with Silicone Seal Kitchen Pantry Storage for Dry Food Biscuits Sweets and Treats
features: STYLISH STORAGE | The 2 Litre Kilner Universal Jar is suitable for a variety of storage solutions in the kitchen from countertop biscuits, sweets and treats to dried food ingredients kept in cupboards and pantries – a stylish alternative to any plastic storage.
FRESHER FOR LONGER | The push top glass lid incorporates a high-quality silicone gasket to provide a secure and airtight seal keeping dry foods fresher for longer.

DURABILITY | The universal push top jar is made from high-quality sodalime glass with pristine clarity and consistent wall thickness ensuring no weak points, please note this product is handwash only, do not pour boiling directly into the jar. Dimensions: H19 x W15.6 x L15.6 cm.

SUSTAINABILITY | Made from natural ingredients so no harmful chemicals or toxins can leak into the food, and BPA free- glass, this push top jar does not absorb odours, flavours or stains, not only is glass a healthier option, but it is also made to last and never for single use, Kilner continues to tackle plastic waste with our ethos of REUSE, REFILL, RECYCLE.

THE KILNER STORY | The original Kilner Jar, invented by John Kilner and Co. in England is as much loved and successful now as it was over 180 years ago. Our diverse product range provides simple solutions for preserving, food preparation, storage and eating on-the-go using high quality materials all authenticated with the iconic Kilner brand logo.
